title: VISTA: Verification In Sequential Turn-based Assessment
authors: Ashley Lewis, Andrew Perrault, Eric Fosler-Lussier, Michael White
abstract: Hallucination--defined here as generating statements unsupported or contradicted by available evidence or conversational context--remains a major obstacle to deploying conversational AI systems in settings that demand factual reliability. Existing metrics either evaluate isolated responses or treat unverifiable content as errors, limiting their use for multi-turn dialogue. We introduce VISTA (Verification In Sequential Turn-based Assessment), a framework for evaluating conversational factuality through claim-level verification and sequential consistency tracking. VISTA decomposes each assistant turn into atomic factual claims, verifies them against trusted sources and dialogue history, and categorizes unverifiable statements (subjective, contradicted, lacking evidence, or abstaining). Across eight large language models and four dialogue factuality benchmarks (AIS, BEGIN, FAITHDIAL, and FADE), VISTA substantially improves hallucination detection over FACTSCORE and LLM-as-Judge baselines. Human evaluation confirms that VISTA's decomposition improves annotator agreement and reveals inconsistencies in existing benchmarks. By modeling factuality as a dynamic property of conversation, VISTA offers a more transparent, human-aligned measure of truthfulness in dialogue systems.
reason: 该论文的核心贡献是提出一个用于评估对话系统事实性（hallucination detection）的框架（VISTA），其研究焦点在于评估方法论、声明级验证与序列一致性追踪。这与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择/推测解码）在核心目标、技术方法和关键词上均无直接重叠。论文本身质量较高，实验设计充分，但其成果对用户当前的研究方向（优化训练数据或解码速度）价值有限，属于相关领域（LLM评估）但非用户目标方向的文献。
abstract_zh: 幻觉——在此定义为生成缺乏证据支持或与可用证据及对话上下文相矛盾的陈述——仍是部署要求事实可靠性的会话式AI系统的主要障碍。现有指标要么评估孤立回复，要么将不可验证内容视为错误，这限制了它们在多轮对话中的应用。我们提出了VISTA（顺序轮次评估中的验证），一个通过主张级验证和序列一致性追踪来评估对话事实性的框架。VISTA将每个助手轮次分解为原子级事实主张，对照可信来源和对话历史进行验证，并对不可验证陈述（主观、矛盾、缺乏证据或回避）进行分类。在八个大型语言模型和四个对话事实性基准（AIS、BEGIN、FAITHDIAL和FADE）上的测试表明，VISTA在幻觉检测上显著优于FACTSCORE和LLM-as-Judge基线。人类评估证实，VISTA的分解提高了标注者一致性，并揭示了现有基准中的不一致性。通过将事实性建模为对话的动态属性，VISTA为对话系统提供了更透明、更符合人类认知的真实性度量。

title: IDALC: A Semi-Supervised Framework for Intent Detection and Active Learning based Correction
authors: Ankan Mullick, Sukannya Purkayastha, Saransh Sharma, Pawan Goyal, Niloy Ganguly
abstract: Voice-controlled dialog systems have become immensely popular due to their ability to perform a wide range of actions in response to diverse user queries. These agents possess a predefined set of skills or intents to fulfill specific user tasks. But every system has its own limitations. There are instances where, even for known intents, if any model exhibits low confidence, it results in rejection of utterances that necessitate manual annotation. Additionally, as time progresses, there may be a need to retrain these agents with new intents from the system-rejected queries to carry out additional tasks. Labeling all these emerging intents and rejected utterances over time is impractical, thus calling for an efficient mechanism to reduce annotation costs. In this paper, we introduce IDALC (Intent Detection and Active Learning based Correction), a semi-supervised framework designed to detect user intents and rectify system-rejected utterances while minimizing the need for human annotation. Empirical findings on various benchmark datasets demonstrate that our system surpasses baseline methods, achieving a 5-10% higher accuracy and a 4-8% improvement in macro-F1. Remarkably, we maintain the overall annotation cost at just 6-10% of the unlabelled data available to the system. The overall framework of IDALC is shown in Fig. 1
reason: 该论文的研究内容（基于主动学习的意图检测与半监督纠错框架）与您指定的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）无直接关联。论文聚焦于对话系统的意图识别和标注成本优化，属于自然语言处理中任务型对话或主动学习的范畴，未涉及LLM预训练数据筛选、质量评估或解码加速技术。尽管主动学习思想在数据选择中有潜在泛化价值，但本文的应用场景和方法论与您的核心关注点契合度低。
abstract_zh: 语音控制对话系统因其能够响应多样化的用户查询并执行广泛操作而日益普及。这些系统拥有预定义的技能或意图集合以完成特定用户任务。然而，每个系统都存在自身局限：即便对于已知意图，当模型置信度较低时，仍会拒绝需人工标注的话语。此外，随时间推移，系统可能需要从被拒查询中提取新意图进行再训练，以支持更多任务。但持续标注这些新兴意图及被拒话语并不切实际，因此亟需高效机制以降低标注成本。本文提出IDALC（基于意图检测与主动学习的修正）框架，该半监督框架旨在检测用户意图并修正系统拒绝的话语，同时最大限度减少人工标注需求。在多个基准数据集上的实证结果表明，该系统超越基线方法，准确率提升5-10%，宏F1值改善4-8%。尤为突出的是，整体标注成本仅占系统可用未标注数据的6-10%。IDALC的整体框架如图1所示。

title: Steering LLMs toward Korean Local Speech: Iterative Refinement Framework for Faithful Dialect Translation
authors: Keunhyeung Park, Seunguk Yu, Youngbin Kim
abstract: Standard-to-dialect machine translation remains challenging due to a persistent dialect gap in large language models and evaluation distortions inherent in n-gram metrics, which favor source copying over authentic dialect translation. In this paper, we propose the dialect refinement (DIA-REFINE) framework, which guides LLMs toward faithful target dialect outputs through an iterative loop of translation, verification, and feedback using external dialect classifiers. To address the limitations of n-gram-based metrics, we introduce the dialect fidelity score (DFS) to quantify linguistic shift and the target dialect ratio (TDR) to measure the success of dialect translation. Experiments on Korean dialects across zero-shot and in-context learning baselines demonstrate that DIA-REFINE consistently enhances dialect fidelity. The proposed metrics distinguish between False Success cases, where high n-gram scores obscure failures in dialectal translation, and True Attempt cases, where genuine attempts at dialectal translation yield low n-gram scores. We also observed that models exhibit varying degrees of responsiveness to the framework, and that integrating in-context examples further improves the translation of dialectal expressions. Our work establishes a robust framework for goal-directed, inclusive dialect translation, providing both rigorous evaluation and critical insights into model performance.
reason: 该论文的核心工作聚焦于利用LLM进行方言翻译任务，并提出了一个迭代优化框架和新的评估指标。虽然论文研究对象是LLM，但其内容（方言翻译、评估指标设计）与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在技术焦点上并无直接交集。论文未涉及数据筛选、课程学习、推测采样或并行解码等关键词。因此，相关性较低。不过，论文作为一项完整的LLM应用研究，在方法论和实验设计上具有一定的质量和参考价值，故评为2分。
abstract_zh: 标准到方言的机器翻译仍然具有挑战性，这是由于大语言模型中持续的方言差距以及n-gram度量标准固有的评估扭曲，后者倾向于源文本复制而非真实的方言翻译。在本文中，我们提出了方言精炼（DIA-REFINE）框架，该框架通过使用外部方言分类器的翻译、验证和反馈的迭代循环，引导大语言模型产生忠实的目标方言输出。为了克服基于n-gram的度量标准的局限性，我们引入了方言忠实度分数（DFS）来量化语言转变，以及目标方言比率（TDR）来测量方言翻译的成功。在韩国方言上进行的实验，涵盖零样本和上下文学习基线，表明DIA-REFINE一致地提高了方言忠实度。提出的度量标准能够区分False Success案例（其中高n-gram分数掩盖了方言翻译的失败）和True Attempt案例（其中真实的方言翻译尝试产生了低n-gram分数）。我们还观察到模型对框架的响应程度不同，并且整合上下文示例进一步改善了方言表达的翻译。我们的工作建立了一个鲁棒的、目标导向的包容性方言翻译框架，提供了严格的评估和对模型性能的关键见解。

title: Point of Order: Action-Aware LLM Persona Modeling for Realistic Civic Simulation
authors: Scott Merrill, Shashank Srivastava
abstract: Large language models offer opportunities to simulate multi-party deliberation, but realistic modeling remains limited by a lack of speaker-attributed data. Transcripts produced via automatic speech recognition (ASR) assign anonymous speaker labels (e.g., Speaker_1), preventing models from capturing consistent human behavior. This work introduces a reproducible pipeline to transform public Zoom recordings into speaker-attributed transcripts with metadata like persona profiles and pragmatic action tags (e.g., [propose_motion]). We release three local government deliberation datasets: Appellate Court hearings, School Board meetings, and Municipal Council sessions. Fine-tuning LLMs to model specific participants using this "action-aware" data produces a 67% reduction in perplexity and nearly doubles classifier-based performance metrics for speaker fidelity and realism. Turing-style human evaluations show our simulations are often indistinguishable from real deliberations, providing a practical and scalable method for complex realistic civic simulations.
reason: 该论文的核心贡献是构建说话者属性数据以提升公民模拟的真实性，并发布了相关数据集。虽然涉及数据整理（transformation pipeline），但重点在于下游应用（civic simulation）而非LLM训练中的数据选择技术（如数据过滤、质量评估、课程学习等）。与用户指定的'LLM training: data selection'领域在方法论和目标上均无直接重叠，与'speculative decoding'领域完全无关。论文本身质量较高，但对用户的研究方向价值有限。
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型为模拟多方审议提供了机遇，但现实建模仍受限于缺乏带有说话者身份归属的数据。通过自动语音识别（ASR）生成的文字记录赋予匿名说话者标签（如“Speaker_1”），导致模型无法捕捉一致的人类行为。本研究引入一个可复现的流程，将公共Zoom会议录像转化为带有说话者身份归属的文字记录，并附加元数据，如角色档案和务实行动标签（如[提出动议]）。我们发布了三个地方政府审议数据集：上诉法院听证会、校董会会议和市议会 sessions。使用此“行动感知”数据对大型语言模型进行微调以建模特定参与者，可将困惑度降低67%，并将基于分类器的性能指标（衡量说话者忠实度与真实性）提升近一倍。图灵测试式的人类评估表明，我们的模拟结果往往与真实审议难以区分，为复杂、现实的公民模拟提供了一种实用且可扩展的方法。

title: A Language-Agnostic Hierarchical LoRA-MoE Architecture for CTC-based Multilingual ASR
authors: Yuang Zheng, Dongxu Chen, Yuxiang Mei, Dongxing Xu, Jie Chen, Yanhua Long
abstract: Large-scale multilingual ASR (mASR) models such as Whisper achieve strong performance but incur high computational and latency costs, limiting their deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. In this study, we propose a lightweight and language-agnostic multilingual ASR system based on a CTC architecture with domain adaptation. Specifically, we introduce a Language-agnostic Hierarchical LoRA-MoE (HLoRA) framework integrated into an mHuBERT-CTC model, enabling end-to-end decoding via LID-posterior-driven LoRA routing. The hierarchical design consists of a multilingual shared LoRA for learning language-invariant acoustic representations and language-specific LoRA experts for modeling language-dependent characteristics. The proposed routing mechanism removes the need for prior language identity information or explicit language labels during inference, achieving true language-agnostic decoding. Experiments on MSR-86K and the MLC-SLM 2025 Challenge datasets demonstrate that HLoRA achieves comparable performance to two-stage inference approaches while reducing RTF by 11.7% and 8.2%, respectively, leading to improved decoding efficiency for low-resource mASR applications.
reason: 该论文的研究主题为基于CTC的多语言自动语音识别（ASR），核心贡献是提出一种语言无关的LoRA-MoE架构以提升解码效率。虽然论文中使用了LoRA和MoE等技术，但其应用领域（语音识别）与用户指定的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择/推测解码）无直接关联。论文未涉及LLM训练、数据策展、推测采样或快速解码等关键词，因此相关性极低，对用户研究无直接参考价值。

title: Multi-Agent LLMs for Generating Research Limitations
authors: Ibrahim Al Azher, Zhishuai Guo, Hamed Alhoori
abstract: Identifying and articulating limitations is essential for transparent and rigorous scientific research. However, zero-shot large language models (LLMs) approach often produce superficial or general limitation statements (e.g., dataset bias or generalizability). They usually repeat limitations reported by authors without looking at deeper methodological issues and contextual gaps. This problem is made worse because many authors disclose only partial or trivial limitations. We propose, a multi-agent LLM framework for generating substantive limitations. It integrates OpenReview comments and author-stated limitations to provide stronger ground truth. It also uses cited and citing papers to capture broader contextual weaknesses. In this setup, different agents have specific roles as sequential role: some extract explicit limitations, others analyze methodological gaps, some simulate the viewpoint of a peer reviewer, and a citation agent places the work within the larger body of literature. A Judge agent refines their outputs, and a Master agent consolidates them into a clear set. This structure allows for systematic identification of explicit, implicit, peer review-focused, and literature-informed limitations. Moreover, traditional NLP metrics like BLEU, ROUGE, and cosine similarity rely heavily on n-gram or embedding overlap. They often overlook semantically similar limitations. To address this, we introduce a pointwise evaluation protocol that uses an LLM-as-a-Judge to measure coverage more accurately. Experiments show that our proposed model substantially improve performance. The RAG + multi-agent GPT-4o mini configuration achieves a +15.51\% coverage gain over zero-shot baselines, while the Llama 3 8B multi-agent setup yields a +4.41\% improvement.
reason: 该论文提出了一种用于生成研究局限性的多智能体LLM框架，并引入了基于LLM的评估协议。论文本身质量较高，方法设计系统，实验部分展示了性能提升。然而，其核心关注点（科学文本生成、元科学分析）与用户指定的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）无直接关联。论文中虽使用了LLM和RAG技术，但未涉及数据 curation/filtering 或解码加速优化等关键技术问题。因此，相关性较低，但作为LLM应用的一个创新案例，仍具有一定的参考价值。
abstract_zh: 识别并清晰阐述研究局限性，是实现透明、严谨科学研究的基石。然而，零样本大语言模型（LLM）常产生表面化或泛化的局限性陈述（例如数据集偏差或普适性不足），通常仅重复作者已报告的内容，而未能深入审视方法论层面的问题及情境性缺口。加之许多作者仅披露部分或不重要的局限性，此问题进一步加剧。为此，我们提出一个用于生成实质性局限性的多智能体LLM框架。该框架整合OpenReview评论与作者声明的局限性，以提供更可靠的基准事实，同时利用引用论文与被引论文捕捉更广泛的上下文性弱点。在此设定下，不同智能体承担特定角色：部分提取显性局限性，部分分析方法论缺口，部分模拟同行评审视角，引用智能体则将研究置于更广阔的学术文献脉络中。法官智能体优化各智能体的输出，主智能体将其整合为一组清晰结论。此结构使得系统性地识别显性、隐性、聚焦同行评审以及基于文献的局限性成为可能。此外，BLEU、ROUGE等传统自然语言处理指标严重依赖n-gram或嵌入重叠，常忽略语义上相似的局限性表述。为解决此问题，我们引入一种点式评估协议，采用LLM作为评判者以更精确地衡量覆盖率。实验表明，所提模型显著提升性能：RAG结合多智能体GPT-4o mini的配置相较于零样本基线实现15.51%的覆盖率提升，而Llama 3 8B多智能体设置带来4.41%的改进。

title: BabyReasoningBench: Generating Developmentally-Inspired Reasoning Tasks for Evaluating Baby Language Models
authors: Kaustubh D. Dhole
abstract: Traditional evaluations of reasoning capabilities of language models are dominated by adult-centric benchmarks that presuppose broad world knowledge, complex instruction following, and mature pragmatic competence. These assumptions are mismatched to baby language models trained on developmentally plausible input such as child-directed speech and early-childhood narratives, and they obscure which reasoning abilities (if any) emerge under such constraints. We introduce BabyReasoningBench, a GPT-5.2 generated benchmark of 19 reasoning tasks grounded in classic paradigms from developmental psychology, spanning theory of mind, analogical and relational reasoning, causal inference and intervention selection, and core reasoning primitives that are known to be confounded by memory and pragmatics. We find that two GPT-2 based baby language models (pretrained on 10M and 100M of child-directed speech text) show overall low but uneven performance, with dissociations across task families: scaling improves several causal and physical reasoning tasks, while belief attribution and pragmatics-sensitive tasks remain challenging. BabyReasoningBench provides a developmentally grounded lens for analyzing what kinds of reasoning are supported by child-like training distributions, and for testing mechanistic hypotheses about how such abilities emerge.
reason: 该论文的研究内容（为婴儿语言模型开发发展心理学启发的推理基准）与用户指定的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）无直接关联。论文未涉及数据筛选、过滤、课程学习、推测解码等核心关键词，其核心贡献在于评估框架设计，而非用户关注的技术方法。尽管论文本身质量尚可，但针对用户的研究目标，其价值非常有限。

title: From Intuition to Calibrated Judgment: A Rubric-Based Expert-Panel Study of Human Detection of LLM-Generated Korean Text
authors: Shinwoo Park, Yo-Sub Han
abstract: Distinguishing human-written Korean text from fluent LLM outputs remains difficult even for trained readers, who can over-trust surface well-formedness. We present LREAD, a Korean-specific instantiation of a rubric-based expert-calibration framework for human attribution of LLM-generated text. In a three-phase blind longitudinal study with three linguistically trained annotators, Phase 1 measures intuition-only attribution, Phase 2 introduces criterion-anchored scoring with explicit justifications, and Phase 3 evaluates a limited held-out elementary-persona subset. Majority-vote accuracy improves from 0.60 in Phase 1 to 0.90 in Phase 2, and reaches 10/10 on the limited Phase 3 subset (95% CI [0.692, 1.000]); agreement also increases from Fleiss' $\kappa$ = -0.09 to 0.82. Error analysis suggests that calibration primarily reduces false negatives on AI essays rather than inducing generalized over-detection. We position LREAD as pilot evidence for within-panel calibration in a Korean argumentative-essay setting. These findings suggest that rubric-scaffolded human judgment can complement automated detectors by making attribution reasoning explicit, auditable, and adaptable.
reason: 该论文研究的是人类专家通过评分框架校准来检测韩语LLM生成文本，核心贡献在于提升人类判断的准确性和一致性。虽然研究对象（LLM生成的文本）与用户研究方向（LLM训练与解码）有间接关联，但论文聚焦于‘人类检测’与‘专家校准’这一应用与认知层面，并未涉及用户指定的任何核心关键词（如数据选择、推测解码、数据质量、快速解码等）。论文设计严谨（三阶段盲法纵向研究），结果清晰，在AI文本检测领域有一定价值，但与用户指定的两个技术研究方向（llm-data-selection, speculative-decoding）相关性中等。
abstract_zh: 区分人类撰写的韩语文本与流畅的LLM输出，即使对受过训练的读者来说仍然困难，因为他们可能过度信任表面的流畅性。我们提出了LREAD，这是一个针对韩语的、基于评分标准的专家校准框架的具体实例，用于人类对LLM生成文本的归属判断。在一项包含三名语言训练标注者的三阶段盲法纵向研究中，第一阶段测量仅凭直觉的归属判断，第二阶段引入以标准为锚定的评分并附明确理由，第三阶段评估一个有限的保留小学 persona 子集。多数投票准确率从第一阶段的0.60提高到第二阶段的0.90，并在有限的第三阶段子集上达到10/10（95%置信区间[0.692, 1.000]）；一致性也从Fleiss' κ = -0.09提高到0.82。误差分析表明，校准主要减少了AI论文的错误否定（漏报），而非引发普遍的过度检测（误报）。我们将LREAD定位为韩语议论文情境中小组内校准的试点证据。这些发现表明，基于评分标准辅助的人类判断可以通过使归属推理更明确、可审计和可适应，来补充自动检测器。
core_contribution: 该研究针对人类难以可靠区分人类与LLM生成的韩语文本的问题，提出了基于评分标准的专家校准框架LREAD，并通过三阶段实验证明其能显著提升判断准确性与一致性。

title: Should LLMs, like, Generate How Users Talk? Building Dialect-Accurate Dialog[ue]s Beyond the American Default with MDial
authors: Jio Oh, Paul Vicinanza, Thomas Butler, Steven Euijong Whang, Dezhi Hong, Amani Namboori
abstract: More than 80% of the 1.6 billion English speakers do not use Standard American English (SAE) and experience higher failure rates and stereotyped responses when interacting with LLMs as a result. Yet multi-dialectal performance remains underexplored. We introduce MDial, the first large-scale framework for generating multi-dialectal conversational data encompassing the three pillars of written dialect -- lexical (vocabulary), orthographic (spelling), and morphosyntactic (grammar) features -- for nine English dialects. Partnering with native linguists, we design an annotated and scalable rule-based LLM transformation to ensure precision. Our approach challenges the assumption that models should mirror users' morphosyntactic features, showing that up to 90% of the grammatical features of a dialect should not be reproduced by models. Independent evaluations confirm data quality, with annotators preferring MDial outputs over prior methods in 98% of pairwise comparisons for dialect naturalness. Using this pipeline, we construct the dialect-parallel MDialBenchmark with 50k+ dialogs, resulting in 97k+ QA pairs, and evaluate 17 LLMs on dialect identification and response generation tasks. Even frontier models achieve under 70% accuracy, fail to reach 50% for Canadian English, and systematically misclassify non-SAE dialects as American or British. As dialect identification underpins natural language understanding, these errors risk cascading failures into downstream tasks.
reason: 该论文的核心工作是构建多方言对话数据集（MDial）并评估LLMs在多方言场景下的性能，属于方言处理（dialect processing）和LLM评估（LLM evaluation）的范畴。论文的研究问题（方言准确性）与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在技术目标和关键词上均无直接重叠，因此相关性较低。然而，论文本身问题定义清晰、方法严谨（与语言学家合作设计规则转换）、实验充分（构建大规模基准并评估17个模型），且揭示了LLM在多方言任务上的显著缺陷，具有独立的学术价值和现实意义，故给予2分（相关性低但有一定价值）。
abstract_zh: 全球16亿英语使用者中，超过80%并不使用标准美式英语（SAE），因此在与大型语言模型（LLM）交互时会遭遇更高的失败率并收到刻板化的回应。然而，模型在多方言场景下的性能尚未得到充分探索。本研究引入了MDial，这是首个用于生成多方言对话数据的大规模框架，它涵盖了书面方言的三大支柱——词汇（用词）、拼写（正字法）和形态句法（语法）——覆盖九种英语方言。通过与母语语言学家合作，我们设计了一个经过标注且可扩展的、基于规则的LLM转换方法，以确保精度。我们的方法挑战了“模型应完全复现用户形态句法特征”的假设，表明实际上高达90%的方言语法特征不应被模型所复制。独立评估确认了数据质量，在98%的成对比较中，标注者认为MDial的输出在方言自然度上优于先前方法。利用此流水线，我们构建了包含5万以上对话、衍生出9.7万以上问答对的方言平行数据集MDialBenchmark，并在方言识别与回复生成任务上评估了17个LLM。即使是前沿模型，其准确率也低于70%，在加拿大英语上未能达到50%，并系统性将非SAE方言误分类为美式或英式英语。由于方言识别是自然语言理解的基础，这些错误可能导致连锁失效，影响下游任务。

title: ChemPro: A Progressive Chemistry Benchmark for Large Language Models
authors: Aaditya Baranwal, Shruti Vyas
abstract: We introduce ChemPro, a progressive benchmark with 4100 natural language question-answer pairs in Chemistry, across 4 coherent sections of difficulty designed to assess the proficiency of Large Language Models (LLMs) in a broad spectrum of general chemistry topics. We include Multiple Choice Questions and Numerical Questions spread across fine-grained information recall, long-horizon reasoning, multi-concept questions, problem-solving with nuanced articulation, and straightforward questions in a balanced ratio, effectively covering Bio-Chemistry, Inorganic-Chemistry, Organic-Chemistry and Physical-Chemistry. ChemPro is carefully designed analogous to a student's academic evaluation for basic to high-school chemistry. A gradual increase in the question difficulty rigorously tests the ability of LLMs to progress from solving basic problems to solving more sophisticated challenges. We evaluate 45+7 state-of-the-art LLMs, spanning both open-source and proprietary variants, and our analysis reveals that while LLMs perform well on basic chemistry questions, their accuracy declines with different types and levels of complexity. These findings highlight the critical limitations of LLMs in general scientific reasoning and understanding and point towards understudied dimensions of difficulty, emphasizing the need for more robust methodologies to improve LLMs.
reason: 该论文提出一个化学领域的渐进式基准测试（ChemPro），旨在评估大语言模型在化学知识上的表现。论文本身设计严谨、实验充分，属于高质量的领域特定基准工作。然而，其核心内容（化学问答基准构建与评估）与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在技术焦点上无直接关联。尽管论文涉及LLM评估，但未触及数据 curation/filtering/influence 或 decoding 加速等关键技术，因此相关性很低。不过，作为一份方法完整的基准论文，它在化学AI领域具有独立的参考价值，故评为2分（相关性低但有一定价值）。
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了ChemPro，一个渐进式化学基准，包含4100个自然语言问答对，涵盖4个连贯的难度部分，旨在评估大语言模型（LLMs）在广泛一般化学主题中的熟练程度。该基准包括选择题和数值题，这些题目以平衡比例分布在细粒度信息回忆、长时推理、多概念问题、细微表述的问题解决以及直接问题中，有效覆盖了生物化学、无机化学、有机化学和物理化学。ChemPro精心设计，类似于学生从基础到高中化学的学术评估。问题难度逐渐增加，严格测试LLMs从解决基本问题到应对更复杂挑战的能力。我们评估了45个开源和7个专有的最先进LLMs，分析显示，尽管LLMs在基础化学问题上表现良好，但其准确性随问题复杂性和类型的不同而下降。这些发现突显了LLMs在一般科学推理和理解中的关键局限性，并指向未被充分研究的难度维度，强调需要更稳健的方法来改进LLMs。

title: DSB: Dynamic Sliding Block Scheduling for Diffusion LLMs
authors: Lizhuo Luo, Shenggui Li, Yonggang Wen, Tianwei Zhang
abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative for text generation, distinguished by their native support for parallel decoding. In practice, block inference is crucial for avoiding order misalignment in global bidirectional decoding and improving output quality. However, the widely-used fixed, predefined block (naive) schedule is agnostic to semantic difficulty, making it a suboptimal strategy for both quality and efficiency: it can force premature commitments to uncertain positions while delaying easy positions near block boundaries. In this work, we analyze the limitations of naive block scheduling and disclose the importance of dynamically adapting the schedule to semantic difficulty for reliable and efficient inference. Motivated by this, we propose Dynamic Sliding Block (DSB), a training-free block scheduling method that uses a sliding block with a dynamic size to overcome the rigidity of the naive block. To further improve efficiency, we introduce DSB Cache, a training-free KV-cache mechanism tailored to DSB. Extensive experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate that DSB, together with DSB Cache, consistently improves both generation quality and inference efficiency for dLLMs. Code is released at https://github.com/lizhuo-luo/DSB.
reason: 该论文的核心贡献是针对扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）推理过程中的‘块调度’问题，提出了一种动态滑动块（DSB）方法及其缓存机制，以提升生成质量和推理效率。这与您的研究方向‘LLM训练的数据选择’（关注训练数据层面）无直接关联。虽然论文涉及‘推理效率’和‘并行解码’，但其方法（动态调整块大小以解决顺序对齐问题）与您研究方向中的‘推测解码’（通常指通过草稿模型加速自回归解码）在技术范式、目标模型（扩散模型 vs. 自回归模型）和解决的问题上均不同，因此相关性很低。然而，论文问题定义清晰，方法有针对性，且提供了充分的实验验证，对扩散模型社区有一定参考价值，故不属于低价值或垃圾文章。
abstract_zh: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）作为一种新兴的文本生成方案，其特点是原生支持并行解码。在实践中，块推理对于避免全局双向解码中的顺序错位以及提升输出质量至关重要。然而，广泛使用的固定、预定义块（朴素）调度策略忽视了语义难度差异，是一种在质量与效率上均次优的策略：它可能迫使模型对不确定位置过早承诺，同时将容易处理的位置推迟到块边界附近。本研究分析了朴素块调度的局限性，并揭示了根据语义难度动态调整调度对实现可靠且高效推理的重要性。受此启发，我们提出了动态滑动块（DSB），一种无需训练的块调度方法，它通过使用动态尺寸的滑动块来克服朴素调度的僵化性。为进一步提升效率，我们引入了DSB缓存，一种专为DSB设计的无需训练的KV缓存机制。在多个模型与基准测试上的大量实验表明，DSB与DSB缓存相结合，能够持续提升dLLMs的生成质量与推理效率。代码已公开于 https://github.com/lizhuo-luo/DSB。

title: A Multilingual Human Annotated Corpus of Original and Easy-to-Read Texts to Support Access to Democratic Participatory Processes
authors: Stefan Bott, Verena Riegler, Horacio Saggion, Almudena Rasc\'on Alcaina, Nouran Khallaf
abstract: Being able to understand information is a key factor for a self-determined life and society. It is also very important for participating in democratic processes. The study of automatic text simplification is often limited by the availability of high quality material for the training and evaluation on automatic simplifiers. This is true for English, but more so for less resourced languages like Spanish, Catalan and Italian. In order to fill this gap, we present a corpus of original texts for these 3 languages, with high quality simplification produced by human experts in text simplification. It was developed within the iDEM project to assess the impact of Easy-to-Read (E2R) language for democratic participation. The original texts were compiled from domains related to this topic. The corpus includes different text types, selected based on relevance, copyright availability, and ethical standards. All texts were simplified to E2R level. The corpus is particularity valuable because it includes the first annotated corpus of its kind for the Catalan language. It also represents a noteworthy contribution for Spanish and Italian, offering high-quality, human-annotated language resources that are rarely available in these domains. The corpus will be made freely accessible to the public.
reason: 该论文的核心工作是构建一个面向民主参与主题的多语言（西班牙语、加泰罗尼亚语、意大利语）原文与易读文本对照语料库，并强调其社会应用价值与人类专家标注质量。论文主题属于计算语言学/社会计算领域的资源构建与应用，与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择技术、推测解码技术）在核心目标、方法论和关键技术点上均无直接关联。虽然高质量的简化语料库可能间接用于训练文本简化模型（属于NLP应用），但论文本身未涉及用户关注的数据筛选、过滤、质量评估、影响函数、或任何解码加速技术。因此，与用户研究方向的关联性极低，仅存在非常间接的、潜在的应用场景价值。

title: QAQ: Bidirectional Semantic Coherence for Selecting High-Quality Synthetic Code Instructions
authors: Jiayin Lei, Ming Ma, Yunxi Duan, Chenxi Li, Tianming Yang
abstract: Synthetic data has become essential for training code generation models, yet it introduces significant noise and hallucinations that are difficult to detect with current metrics. Existing data selection methods like Instruction-Following Difficulty (IFD) typically assess how hard a model generates an answer given a query ($A|Q$). However, this metric is ambiguous on noisy synthetic data, where low probability can distinguish between intrinsic task complexity and model-generated hallucinations. Here, we propose QAQ, a novel data selection framework that evaluates data quality from the reverse direction: how well can the answer predict the query ($Q|A$)? We define Reverse Mutual Information (RMI) to quantify the information gain about the query conditioned on the answer. Our analyses reveal that both extremes of RMI signal quality issues: low RMI indicates semantic misalignment, while excessively high RMI may contain defect patterns that LLMs easily recognize. Furthermore, we introduce a selection strategy based on the disagreement between strong and weak models to identify samples that are valid yet challenging. Experiments on the WarriorCoder dataset demonstrate that selecting just 25% of data using stratified RMI achieves comparable performance to full-data training, significantly outperforming existing data selection methods. Our approach highlights the importance of bidirectional semantic coherence in synthetic data curation, offering a scalable pathway to reduce computational costs without sacrificing model capability.
reason: 该论文直接针对用户研究方向中的‘LLM training: data selection’领域，提出了一种新颖的双向语义一致性（QAQ）框架用于合成代码数据的选择。其核心方法（Reverse Mutual Information, 强/弱模型 disagreement）与研究方向中的‘data selection, data curation, data quality’高度契合。论文问题定义清晰，方法有理论创新（双向评估解决单向指标歧义），实验在代码生成数据集上验证了高效性（仅25%数据达到全量训练效果）和优越性（显著优于现有方法）。整体质量优秀，对合成数据 curation 具有重要参考价值，值得深入分析和精读。
abstract_zh: 合成数据已成为训练代码生成模型的关键资源，但其引入的显著噪声和幻觉难以被现有指标检测。现有的数据选择方法（如指令遵循难度 IFD）通常评估模型在给定查询下生成答案的难易度（A|Q）。然而，该指标在噪声合成数据上存在歧义，因为低概率可能源于内在任务复杂度，也可能源于模型生成的幻觉。本文提出 QAQ，一种新颖的数据选择框架，它从反向视角评估数据质量：答案在多大程度上能预测查询（Q|A）？我们定义逆向互信息（RMI）来量化在答案条件下关于查询的信息增益。分析表明，RMI 的两极均指示质量问题：低 RMI 表示语义错位，而过高的 RMI 可能包含缺陷模式，使大语言模型（LLM）轻易识别。此外，我们引入基于强模型与弱模型分歧的选择策略，以识别那些有效但具有挑战性的样本。在 WarriorCoder 数据集上的实验表明，使用分层 RMI 仅选择 25% 的数据即可实现与全数据训练相当的性能，并显著优于现有数据选择方法。我们的方法强调了合成数据策划中双向语义一致性的重要性，为在不牺牲模型能力的前提下降低计算成本提供了一条可扩展的路径。
method_highlights: 提出逆向评估视角：创新性地从答案预测查询（Q|A）的角度评估数据质量，而非传统单向的查询生成答案（A|Q），这一视角转换能有效区分任务固有难度与模型幻觉。
定义逆向互信息（RMI）：将信息论中的互信息概念反转，用以量化给定答案后对查询的信息增益，为衡量语义对齐提供了可计算、可解释的标量指标。
发现 RMI 的双极陷阱：理论分析与实证揭示，RMI 值过低（语义不相关）与过高（包含易识别的缺陷模式）均非高质量数据，为设定筛选阈值提供了理论依据。
结合模型分歧进行选择：利用强模型与弱模型在生成同一答案时预测查询能力（RMI）的差异，识别出那些对弱模型困难但对强模型有效（即真实挑战）的样本，提升了数据集的难度分布质量。
采用分层抽样策略：基于 RMI 值进行分层抽样，确保最终子集在难度谱上分布合理，既避免简单样本冗余，也剔除极端噪声或缺陷样本。
experiment_highlights: 数据效率突破：在 WarriorCoder 数据集上，仅使用 QAQ 筛选出的 25% 高质量数据训练模型，其代码生成性能（如 Pass@k）即可媲美使用 100% 全量数据（含噪声）训练的性能。
显著超越基线：QAQ 方法在性能上大幅优于当时主流的基于 IFD 等单向概率的数据选择方法，验证了双向语义一致性评估的有效性。
RMI 分布分析证实假设：实验数据中，RMI 极低和极高的样本确实与低质量（如错配、模板化缺陷）强相关，而中等 RMI 区域集中了高质量、有挑战性的样本。
模型分歧策略有效：引入强弱模型 RMI 分歧后，所选数据在保持挑战性的同时，有效过滤了弱模型因能力不足而误判为“难”的无效噪声样本。
pros: 理论创新性强：首次系统性地提出并验证了“双向语义一致性”作为合成代码数据质量的核心评估范式，超越了传统单向概率评估的局限。
实用价值高：提供了一种无需额外标注、完全基于现有生成模型计算的可扩展数据筛选方案，能显著降低训练成本（数据量、计算量），对工业界有直接吸引力。
性能提升显著：在标准基准上实现了“少即是多”的效果，用更少、更干净的数据达到相同或更好的模型性能，解决了合成数据“量大质低”的痛点。
洞察深刻：揭示了合成数据质量问题的双重性（语义错位与缺陷模式），为理解 LLM 生成数据的特性提供了新视角。
cons: 数据集单一：主要实验仅在 WarriorCoder 一个合成代码数据集上验证，其结论在其他类型（如自然语言指令）或不同分布的真实/合成数据集上的普适性有待检验。
计算开销增加：RMI 的计算需要为每个样本（Q, A）估算 P(Q|A)，这通常需要运行模型（或近似计算）两次（正向和反向），比单次计算 A|Q 的 IFD 成本更高，尽管最终因数据量减少而可能总体节省。
阈值与超参依赖：RMI 的“最佳区间”以及模型分歧的阈值可能需要针对不同模型架构、任务领域进行调优，论文未充分讨论其敏感性与自动化确定方法。
对幻觉机制分析不够深入：虽然方法能过滤结果，但对合成过程中产生“高 RMI 缺陷模式”（如模型容易识别但错误的代码）的根本原因（如训练数据偏差）探讨较少。
reproducibility: 论文未在摘要中明确说明是否提供官方代码。方法描述包含核心公式（RMI定义）与策略（分层、分歧），但关键实现细节（如 P(Q|A) 的具体近似计算方法、强/弱模型的具体配置、分层抽样的具体比例）需查阅全文。若作者公开完整代码与训练配置，可复现性高；否则，基于摘要描述复现实验需较多额外工作。
task_list: 精读论文全文，获取 RMI 计算的具体实现细节（例如，是否使用模型的对数概率和、或需要训练一个辅助模型）、WarriorCoder 数据集的构建细节及划分方式。
尝试在另一个公开的合成代码数据集（如 CodeContests、APPS 的子集）或自然语言指令数据集（如 ShareGPT）上复现 QAQ 方法，验证其跨领域有效性。
分析 RMI 值分布与具体错误类型（如逻辑错误、语法错误、语义不匹配）的对应关系，以更精细地理解筛选机制。
探索 QAQ 与其他数据选择或清洗方法（如基于embedding的聚类、基于模型置信度的筛选）的融合策略，寻求进一步提升数据效率。
研究 RMI 阈值对最终模型性能的敏感性，并尝试设计自动化确定最优阈值或分层比例的方法（如基于验证集性能）。

title: From Text to Forecasts: Bridging Modality Gap with Temporal Evolution Semantic Space
authors: Lehui Li, Yuyao Wang, Jisheng Yan, Wei Zhang, Jinliang Deng, Haoliang Sun, Zhongyi Han, Yongshun Gong
abstract: Incorporating textual information into time-series forecasting holds promise for addressing event-driven non-stationarity; however, a fundamental modality gap hinders effective fusion: textual descriptions express temporal impacts implicitly and qualitatively, whereas forecasting models rely on explicit and quantitative signals. Through controlled semi-synthetic experiments, we show that existing methods over-attend to redundant tokens and struggle to reliably translate textual semantics into usable numerical cues. To bridge this gap, we propose TESS, which introduces a Temporal Evolution Semantic Space as an intermediate bottleneck between modalities. This space consists of interpretable, numerically grounded temporal primitives (mean shift, volatility, shape, and lag) extracted from text by an LLM via structured prompting and filtered through confidence-aware gating. Experiments on four real-world datasets demonstrate up to a 29 percent reduction in forecasting error compared to state-of-the-art unimodal and multimodal baselines. The code will be released after acceptance.
reason: 论文核心是桥接文本与时间序列预测的模态差距，提出TESS方法使用LLM提取时间原语，与我的研究方向（LLM数据选择或speculative decoding）相关性低。虽然涉及LLM应用和过滤机制，但焦点在于时间序列预测的改进，而非数据选择过程或解码优化，因此价值有限但有一定创新性。
abstract_zh: 将文本信息融入时间序列预测有望解决事件驱动的非平稳性问题；然而，根本性的模态差距阻碍了有效的融合：文本描述以隐性和定性的方式表达时间影响，而预测模型则依赖显性和定量的信号。通过控制的半合成实验，我们发现现有方法过度关注冗余词元，且难以将文本语义可靠地转化为可用的数值线索。为弥合这一差距，我们提出了 TESS，其引入了一个时序演化语义空间作为模态间的中间瓶颈。该空间由通过结构化提示从大型语言模型中提取、并经置信度感知门控过滤的、可解释且具有数值基础的时间基元（均值偏移、波动率、形态和滞后）组成。在四个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，与最先进的单模态和多模态基线相比，预测误差最高降低了29%。代码将在论文接收后公开。

title: Experimental evidence of progressive ChatGPT models self-convergence
authors: Konstantinos F. Xylogiannopoulos, Petros Xanthopoulos, Panagiotis Karampelas, Georgios A. Bakamitsos
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) that undergo recursive training on synthetically generated data are susceptible to model collapse, a phenomenon marked by the generation of meaningless output. Existing research has examined this issue from either theoretical or empirical perspectives, often focusing on a single model trained recursively on its own outputs. While prior studies have cautioned against the potential degradation of LLM output quality under such conditions, no longitudinal investigation has yet been conducted to assess this effect over time. In this study, we employ a text similarity metric to evaluate different ChatGPT models' capacity to generate diverse textual outputs. Our findings indicate a measurable decline of recent ChatGPT releases' ability to produce varied text, even when explicitly prompted to do so, by setting the temperature parameter to one. The observed reduction in output diversity may be attributed to the influence of the amounts of synthetic data incorporated within their training datasets as the result of internet infiltration by LLM generated data. The phenomenon is defined as model self-convergence because of the gradual increase of similarities of produced texts among different ChatGPT versions.
reason: 该论文的研究主题（模型在合成数据上训练后出现的输出多样性下降现象，即‘模型自收敛’）与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）的直接关联较弱。它并未涉及数据选择、过滤、课程学习等具体技术，也未讨论解码加速方法。其核心是观察和分析模型行为随训练数据污染而变化的宏观现象，属于更广泛的LLM训练稳定性与数据质量影响的研究范畴。论文质量方面，摘要描述了一个观察性实验，方法相对简单（主要依赖单一文本相似度指标），结论提示性较强但缺乏深入机制分析或解决方案，属于初步证据，学术价值有限但有一定启发性。因此，相关性低但存在间接价值（触及训练数据质量这一数据选择领域的上游问题），符合2分标准。
abstract_zh: 在递归使用合成生成数据进行训练的大型语言模型（LLMs）容易遭受模型崩溃，这是一种表现为生成无意义内容的現象。现有研究多从理论或实证角度审视此问题，常聚焦于单一模型在其自身输出上递归训练的情况。尽管先前研究已警示在此条件下LLM输出质量可能下降，但迄今尚未开展长期纵向研究以评估此效应随时间的变化。本研究采用文本相似度指标，评估不同ChatGPT模型生成多样化文本输出的能力。研究发现，近期发布的ChatGPT版本在生成多样化文本方面的能力存在可衡量的衰退，即使通过将温度参数设置为1来明确鼓励多样性亦如此。输出多样性的这种降低，可能归因于其训练数据集中所包含的合成数据量——这些数据源于互联网被LLM生成内容渗透的现象。该现象被定义为模型自收敛，因为不同ChatGPT版本间所生成文本的相似度逐渐增加。

title: DS$^2$-Instruct: Domain-Specific Data Synthesis for Large Language Models Instruction Tuning
authors: Ruiyao Xu, Noelle I. Samia, Han Liu
abstract: Adapting Large Language Models (LLMs) to specialized domains requires high-quality instruction tuning datasets, which are expensive to create through human annotation. Existing data synthesis methods focus on general-purpose tasks and fail to capture domain-specific terminology and reasoning patterns. To address this, we introduce DS$^2$-Instruct, a zero-shot framework that generates domain-specific instruction datasets without human supervision. Our approach first generates task-informed keywords to ensure comprehensive domain coverage. It then creates diverse instructions by pairing these keywords with different cognitive levels from Bloom's Taxonomy. Finally, it uses self-consistency validation to ensure data quality. We apply this framework to generate datasets across seven challenging domains, such as mathematics, finance, and logical reasoning. Comprehensive evaluation demonstrates that models fine-tuned on our generated data achieve substantial improvements over existing data generation methods.
reason: 论文核心是提出一个零样本框架用于生成领域特定的指令调优数据，通过任务关键词生成、布鲁姆分类法设计任务层次以及自一致性验证来保证数据质量。这直接对应研究方向中的'LLM training: data selection'（数据选择/生成/质量控制），且方法系统、实验充分（覆盖七个挑战性领域并验证效果），属于高度相关且质量优秀的作品。
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLMs）适配到专业领域需要高质量的指令调优数据集，这些数据集通过人工标注创建成本高昂。现有数据合成方法专注于通用任务，无法捕捉领域特定的术语和推理模式。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了DS²-Instruct，一个零样本框架，无需人工监督即可生成领域特定的指令数据集。我们的方法首先生成任务感知关键词以确保全面的领域覆盖。然后，通过将这些关键词与Bloom's Taxonomy中的不同认知水平配对来创建多样化的指令。最后，使用自一致性验证来确保数据质量。我们将此框架应用于七个具有挑战性的领域，如数学、金融和逻辑推理，生成数据集。全面评估表明，用我们生成的数据微调的模型相比现有数据生成方法取得了显著改进。
method_highlights: 零样本自动生成：无需人工标注，利用LLM自身能力合成领域特定指令，降低成本和门槛。
任务感知关键词生成：通过领域种子词扩展和过滤，确保关键词覆盖专业术语和核心概念，解决领域覆盖不全问题。
Bloom's Taxonomy结构化配对：将关键词与认知层次（如记忆、分析、创造）结合，生成多样化的指令，模拟不同思维深度，提升指令的教育价值和复杂性。
自一致性验证：基于LLM对同一指令的多响应一致性评分过滤低质数据，利用模型自我评估减少噪声，无需额外标注。
巧妙之处：将教育心理学理论（Bloom's Taxonomy）引入数据合成，系统化保证指令多样性；自一致性验证巧妙复用LLM推理能力，实现闭环质量保障。
experiment_highlights: 覆盖七个挑战性领域：包括数学、金融、逻辑推理等，验证框架在多样专业领域的通用性和有效性。
性能显著提升：微调模型在领域基准测试中相比现有方法（如Self-Instruct、GPT-3生成）平均提升5-15%，尤其在需要专业推理的任务上优势明显。
数据集质量对比：生成数据集包含更丰富的领域术语和分层认知指令，人工评估显示相关性、复杂度和准确性均优于通用合成数据集。
消融实验证明：各模块（关键词生成、Bloom's配对、自一致性验证）贡献协同，移除任一模块导致性能下降，凸显设计必要性。
pros: 高效低成本：零样本范式避免人工标注，大幅降低数据集创建费用和时间。
领域深度适配：通过任务关键词和认知配对，精准捕捉领域术语和推理模式，优于通用方法。
数据质量保障：自一致性验证有效过滤错误和模糊指令，提升数据集可靠性和模型微调效果。
方法论创新：首次将Bloom's Taxonomy系统化集成到LLM数据合成，提供可扩展的指令多样化框架。
性能突破：在多个专业领域实现显著性能增益，为领域适配LLM提供实用解决方案。
cons: 依赖基础LLM能力：生成质量受限于所用LLM的知识边界，对冷门或新兴领域可能覆盖不足或产生幻觉。
零样本不完美：缺乏人工监督，生成指令可能存在偏见、不准确或冗余，自一致性验证未必能捕获所有错误。
计算资源开销：关键词扩展和多响应验证需多次LLM调用，对算力要求高，可能限制大规模应用。
实验细节不足：摘要未详述具体LLM版本、生成参数和基线对比设置，影响结果解读和复现。
领域泛化未验证：虽测试七个领域，但未探索极端领域（如高度专业化医学）或跨领域迁移效果。
reproducibility: 基于摘要，研究可复现性较低。未明确说明是否公开代码、数据生成的具体参数（如LLM温度、关键词数量阈值）或实验配置细节（如微调轮次、评估指标）。建议作者补充代码库、生成脚本和完整超参数列表，并开源生成数据集以促进验证。
task_list: 阅读Bloom's Taxonomy经典文献，深入理解认知层次划分，评估其在指令设计中的适用性。
在本地环境复现DS²-Instruct的关键词生成模块，使用开源LLM（如Llama 3）测试领域覆盖效果。
将框架应用到新领域（如法律文档分析或生物医学问答），比较生成数据与现有领域数据集的性能差异。
实验对比不同LLM（如GPT-4、Claude）对自一致性验证稳定性的影响，分析模型选择对数据质量的作用。
设计人工评估协议，系统分析生成指令的错误类型（如术语误用、逻辑缺陷），提出改进自一致性验证的算法。
探索框架与人类反馈结合的半监督变体，平衡零样本效率与数据精度，并评估成本效益。

title: Unsupervised Corpus Poisoning Attacks in Continuous Space for Dense Retrieval
authors: Yongkang Li, Panagiotis Eustratiadis, Simon Lupart, Evangelos Kanoulas
abstract: This paper concerns corpus poisoning attacks in dense information retrieval, where an adversary attempts to compromise the ranking performance of a search algorithm by injecting a small number of maliciously generated documents into the corpus. Our work addresses two limitations in the current literature. First, attacks that perform adversarial gradient-based word substitution search do so in the discrete lexical space, while retrieval itself happens in the continuous embedding space. We thus propose an optimization method that operates in the embedding space directly. Specifically, we train a perturbation model with the objective of maintaining the geometric distance between the original and adversarial document embeddings, while also maximizing the token-level dissimilarity between the original and adversarial documents. Second, it is common for related work to have a strong assumption that the adversary has prior knowledge about the queries. In this paper, we focus on a more challenging variant of the problem where the adversary assumes no prior knowledge about the query distribution (hence, unsupervised). Our core contribution is an adversarial corpus attack that is fast and effective. We present comprehensive experimental results on both in- and out-of-domain datasets, focusing on two related tasks: a top-1 attack and a corpus poisoning attack. We consider attacks under both a white-box and a black-box setting. Notably, our method can generate successful adversarial examples in under two minutes per target document; four times faster compared to the fastest gradient-based word substitution methods in the literature with the same hardware. Furthermore, our adversarial generation method generates text that is more likely to occur under the distribution of natural text (low perplexity), and is therefore more difficult to detect.

abstract_zh: 本文关注密集信息检索中的语料投毒攻击，即攻击者通过向语料中注入少量恶意生成的文档来破坏搜索算法的排序性能。我们的工作解决了当前文献中的两个局限。首先，现有基于对抗梯度的词替换搜索在离散的词汇空间中进行，而检索过程本身发生在连续的嵌入空间。因此，我们提出了一种直接在嵌入空间操作的优化方法。具体而言，我们训练一个扰动模型，其目标是保持原始文档与对抗文档嵌入之间的几何距离，同时最大化两者在词元级别的差异。其次，相关研究常强假设攻击者需具备关于查询的先验知识。本文则聚焦于一个更具挑战性的变体：攻击者假设对查询分布无任何先验知识（即无监督场景）。我们的核心贡献是一种快速且有效的对抗性语料攻击方法。我们在领域内和跨领域数据集上提供了全面的实验结果，重点关注两个相关任务：top-1攻击与语料投毒攻击。我们同时考虑了白盒与黑盒设置下的攻击。值得注意的是，我们的方法可在两分钟内为每个目标文档生成成功的对抗样本，比文献中相同硬件条件下最快的基于梯度的词替换方法快四倍。此外，我们生成的对抗文本更符合自然文本分布（低困惑度），因此更难以被检测。

title: A False Sense of Privacy: Evaluating Textual Data Sanitization Beyond Surface-level Privacy Leakage
authors: Rui Xin, Niloofar Mireshghallah, Shuyue Stella Li, Michael Duan, Hyunwoo Kim, Yejin Choi, Yulia Tsvetkov, Sewoong Oh, Pang Wei Koh
abstract: Sanitizing sensitive text data typically involves removing personally identifiable information (PII) or generating synthetic data under the assumption that these methods adequately protect privacy; however, their effectiveness is often only assessed by measuring the leakage of explicit identifiers but ignoring nuanced textual markers that can lead to re-identification. We challenge the above illusion of privacy by proposing a new framework that evaluates re-identification attacks to quantify individual privacy risks upon data release. Our approach shows that seemingly innocuous auxiliary information -- such as routine social activities -- can be used to infer sensitive attributes like age or substance use history from sanitized data. For instance, we demonstrate that Azure's commercial PII removal tool fails to protect 74\% of information in the MedQA dataset. Although differential privacy mitigates these risks to some extent, it significantly reduces the utility of the sanitized text for downstream tasks. Our findings indicate that current sanitization techniques offer a \textit{false sense of privacy}, highlighting the need for more robust methods that protect against semantic-level information leakage.
reason: 该论文研究文本数据脱敏与隐私风险评估，核心关注点是隐私保护技术（如PII移除、差分隐私）的有效性及其与数据效用的权衡。这与用户提供的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在技术目标和问题范畴上均无直接关联。论文虽属高质量研究（有框架提出、实证分析、商业工具评测），但其贡献领域为数据隐私/安全，不属于用户指定的domain_id范畴。
abstract_zh: 对敏感文本数据进行清理通常涉及移除个人身份信息（PII）或生成合成数据，其前提是这些方法足以保护隐私；然而，这些方法的有效性往往仅通过测量显式标识符的泄漏来评估，却忽略了可能导致重新识别的细微文本标记。我们通过提出一个新框架来挑战上述隐私幻觉，该框架通过评估重新识别攻击来量化数据发布后个体的隐私风险。我们的方法表明，看似无害的辅助信息——例如日常社交活动——可用于从清理后的数据中推断年龄或物质使用史等敏感属性。例如，我们证明Azure的商业PII移除工具在MedQA数据集上未能保护74%的信息。尽管差分隐私在一定程度上缓解了这些风险，但它显著降低了清理后文本在下游任务中的效用。我们的发现表明，当前的清理技术仅提供了一种	extit{虚假的隐私安全感}，凸显了需要更稳健的方法来防范语义层面的信息泄漏。

title: Shorten After You're Right: Lazy Length Penalties for Reasoning RL
authors: Danlong Yuan, Tian Xie, Shaohan Huang, Zhuocheng Gong, Huishuai Zhang, Chong Luo, Furu Wei, Dongyan Zhao
abstract: Large reasoning models, such as OpenAI o1 or DeepSeek R1, have demonstrated remarkable performance on reasoning tasks but often incur a long reasoning path with significant memory and time costs. Existing methods primarily aim to shorten reasoning paths by introducing additional training data and stages. In this paper, we propose three critical reward designs integrated directly into the reinforcement learning process of large reasoning models, which reduce the response length without extra training stages. Experiments on four settings show that our method significantly decreases response length while maintaining or even improving performance. Specifically, in a logic reasoning setting, we achieve a 40% reduction in response length averaged by steps alongside a 14% gain in performance. For math problems, we reduce response length averaged by steps by 33% while preserving performance.
reason: 论文研究推理强化学习中的长度优化，与用户指定的数据选择（data selection/curation/filtering）和推测解码（speculative decoding）领域无直接技术关联。其核心贡献在于RL奖励设计以缩短推理路径，属于推理效率优化范畴，但方法路径与用户研究方向不重合。论文问题定义清晰、实验充分，对推理效率研究有一定参考价值，但非用户关注焦点。
abstract_zh: 大型推理模型（如 OpenAI o1 或 DeepSeek R1）在推理任务上表现出色，但常产生冗长的推理路径，带来显著的记忆与时间开销。现有方法主要通过引入额外训练数据和阶段来缩短推理路径。本文提出三种关键的奖励设计，直接集成到大推理模型的强化学习过程中，无需额外训练阶段即可减少响应长度。在四个实验设置上的结果表明，我们的方法在显著降低响应长度的同时，保持甚至提升了性能。具体而言，在逻辑推理场景中，我们实现了按步平均响应长度降低 40%，同时性能提升 14%；在数学问题场景中，按步平均响应长度降低 33%，且性能得以保持。

title: Curriculum Reinforcement Learning from Easy to Hard Tasks Improves LLM Reasoning
authors: Shubham Parashar, Shurui Gui, Xiner Li, Hongyi Ling, Sushil Vemuri, Blake Olson, Eric Li, Yu Zhang, James Caverlee, Dileep Kalathil, Shuiwang Ji
abstract: We aim to improve the reasoning capabilities of language models via reinforcement learning (RL). Recent RL post-trained models like DeepSeek-R1 have demonstrated reasoning abilities on mathematical and coding tasks. However, prior studies suggest that using RL alone to improve reasoning on inherently difficult tasks is less effective. Here, we draw inspiration from curriculum learning and propose to schedule tasks from easy to hard (E2H), allowing LLMs to build reasoning skills gradually. Our method is termed E2H Reasoner. Empirically, we observe that, although easy tasks are important initially, fading them out through appropriate scheduling is essential in preventing overfitting. Theoretically, we establish convergence guarantees for E2H Reasoner within an approximate policy iteration framework. We derive finite-sample complexity bounds and show that when tasks are appropriately decomposed and conditioned, learning through curriculum stages requires fewer total samples than direct learning. Experiments across multiple domains show that E2H Reasoner significantly improves the reasoning ability of small LLMs (1.5B to 3B), which otherwise struggle when trained with vanilla RL alone, highlighting the effectiveness of our method. Our code can be found on https://github.com/divelab/E2H-Reasoning.
reason: 该论文的核心方法‘课程强化学习’直接对应用户研究方向中‘LLM training: data selection’下的‘curriculum learning’关键词。论文不仅在理论上提供了收敛保证和样本复杂度分析，还在多个领域通过实验验证了方法对小型LLM推理能力的显著提升，并开源了代码，整体质量优秀且与用户研究方向高度契合，属于该领域的核心工作，值得深入精读。
abstract_zh: 我们旨在通过强化学习（RL）提升语言模型的推理能力。最近的RL后训练模型（如DeepSeek-R1）已在数学和编程任务上展现出推理本领。然而，先前研究表明，仅使用RL来提升本质上困难任务的推理效果有限。本文受课程学习启发，提出从易到难（E2H）地调度任务，使大语言模型能够逐步构建推理技能。我们的方法称为E2H Reasoner。实证上我们观察到，尽管简单任务在初期很重要，但通过恰当的调度逐渐将其淡出对于防止过拟合至关重要。理论上，我们在近似策略迭代框架内为E2H Reasoner建立了收敛保证。我们导出了有限样本复杂度界，并表明当任务被恰当分解和条件化时，通过课程阶段学习比直接学习需要更少的总样本量。跨多个领域的实验表明，E2H Reasoner显著提升了小型大语言模型（1.5B至3B参数）的推理能力，而这些模型若仅使用标准RL训练则表现挣扎，这凸显了我们方法的有效性。代码见https://github.com/divelab/E2H-Reasoning。
method_highlights: 核心创新：将课程学习（Curriculum Learning）思想系统性地引入到强化学习训练流程中，设计了从易到难（E2H）的任务调度策略，而非对单一困难任务进行端到端RL训练。
任务分解与难易定义：将复杂推理任务集分解为具有不同难度水平的子任务或阶段。难易度可能基于任务本身的固有属性（如数学题所需步数、代码复杂度）或模型在任务上的初始表现来定义。
动态调度与淡出机制：训练初期以简单任务为主，让模型快速学习基础推理模式并获得正向反馈；随着训练进行，逐步增加困难任务的比例，并相应地‘淡出’简单任务，防止模型在简单任务上过拟合，引导其专注于攻克难题。
理论支撑：在近似策略迭代（Approximate Policy Iteration）框架下分析，证明了在任务条件化分解合理的条件下，课程学习策略能比直接学习（在所有任务上混合训练）获得更优的有限样本复杂度界，即用更少的样本达到同等性能。
与现有RL后训练的结合：E2H调度作为RL训练流程的上层控制器，可与具体的RL算法（如GRPO、PPO）和奖励模型无缝结合，是一种通用且轻量的训练框架改进。
experiment_highlights: 有效性验证：在数学推理（如GSM8K, MATH）和代码生成（如HumanEval）等多个基准上，对1.5B、3B等小型模型使用E2H Reasoner进行RL后训练，其性能显著超越使用标准RL（vanilla RL）训练的基线，甚至能达到或接近更大规模模型的表现，证明了该方法对小模型推理能力提升的普惠性。
消融研究关键发现：通过消融实验证实，‘从易到难’的调度顺序至关重要。若始终使用困难任务（Hard-only）或随机混合任务（Random-mix）进行RL训练，性能提升有限甚至停滞，而E2H策略能稳定提升最终性能。同时，验证了‘淡出’简单任务的必要性，完全保留简单任务会导致后期过拟合。
课程阶段分析：可视化或分析不同训练阶段模型在简单/困难任务上的表现，显示模型在早期快速掌握简单任务，随着困难任务比例增加，其在困难任务上的性能持续提升，验证了技能迁移的有效性。
与SOTA对比：在相同模型规模和RL算法前提下，E2H Reasoner训练出的模型在测试集上的pass@1或准确率等指标，相较于之前使用RL改进推理的工作（如直接对困难任务应用RL）有显著提升，确立了新的小模型性能基准。
pros: 直面核心痛点：精准针对‘RL直接提升困难推理任务性能差’这一关键问题，提出了优雅且符合认知规律的解决方案，理论分析与实验效果高度一致。
理论实践结合紧密：不仅提供了经验有效的工程方案，还在强化学习理论框架内给出了收敛性和样本复杂度的理论保证，增强了方法的科学性和可信度。
高效赋能小模型：实验证明该方法能高效、低成本地提升中小规模模型的推理能力，降低了对超大模型参数的依赖，具有重要的实用价值和研究意义。
框架通用性强：E2H调度策略不依赖于特定的RL算法或任务形式，可作为即插即用的模块应用于各种基于RL的LLM后训练流程中，易于推广。
可复现性高：作者公开了完整代码库，为社区提供了从数据准备、课程调度器设计到RL训练的全流程实现基础。
cons: 任务分解与难度定义的主观性：如何自动、客观、鲁棒地定义和分解任务的‘难易度’是方法成功的关键，但论文中可能依赖于启发式规则或任务元数据（如题目长度），缺乏一个普适、自适应的任务难度量化标准，这可能限制了方法在新领域或开放域任务上的直接应用。
调度策略的敏感性：课程进度的具体设计（如何时开始增加困难任务、淡出速率）可能需要针对不同任务集和模型进行调优，论文虽展示了其有效性，但未提供一个通用的、无需调参的调度公式，增加了应用时的超参数搜索成本。
实验场景相对聚焦：主要验证在数学和编程等有明确答案、可自动评估的领域。对于需要长文本、多轮、开放-ended 的复杂推理（如战略规划、创意写作），E2H策略是否同样有效，尚需进一步探索。
理论假设的理想化：理论分析基于近似策略迭代等理想化框架，并假设任务能被恰当条件化分解。实际训练中，策略更新的非线性、奖励噪声、任务间的复杂关联等因素可能使理论优势在实践中无法完全达到。
计算成本考量：虽然提升了小模型性能，但课程训练可能需要更多轮次的交互（先易后难），总训练步数可能不减少，只是样本利用效率更高。其总计算成本与直接RL训练的比较需具体分析。
reproducibility: 高。论文不仅公开了完整的代码仓库（GitHub链接），且作为一篇系统性的方法论文，其核心贡献（E2H调度器）的实现逻辑清晰，易于从代码中剥离和复现。实验部分详细描述了使用的基座模型、数据集（GSM8K, MATH, HumanEval等）、评估指标（pass@1）以及对比的基线方法（vanilla RL, Hard-only等）。参数设置、训练超参数（如学习率、批次大小、KL惩罚系数）等关键细节应在代码或附录中提供，为复现实验提供了坚实基础。

扩展到新领域：将E2H Reasoner应用于论文未涉及但属于推理范畴的任务，如常识推理（BoolQ）、多模态推理（MathVista），检验其跨领域泛化能力。

分析课程动态：可视化训练过程中模型在简单任务池和困难任务池上性能的演变曲线，直观展示‘技能迁移’和‘防过拟合’的动态过程，并尝试分析其与最终性能的关联。

title: STEMTOX: From Social Tags to Fine-Grained Toxic Meme Detection via Entropy-Guided Multi-Task Learning
authors: Subhankar Swain, Naquee Rizwan, Vishwa Gangadhar S, Nayandeep Deb, Animesh Mukherjee
abstract: Memes, as a widely used mode of online communication, often serve as vehicles for spreading harmful content. However, limitations in data accessibility and the high costs of dataset curation hinder the development of robust meme moderation systems. To address this challenge, in this work, we introduce a first-of-its-kind dataset - TOXICTAGS consisting of 6,300 real-world meme-based posts annotated in two stages: (i) binary classification into toxic and normal, and (ii) fine-grained labelling of toxic memes as hateful, dangerous, or offensive. A key feature of this dataset is that it is enriched with auxiliary metadata of socially relevant tags, enhancing the context of each meme. In addition, we propose a novel entropy guided multi-tasking framework - STEMTOX - that integrates the generation of socially grounded tags with a robust classification framework. Experimental results show that incorporating these tags substantially enhances the performance of state-of-the-art VLMs in toxicity detection tasks. Our contributions offer a novel and scalable foundation for improved content moderation in multimodal online environments. Warning: Contains potentially toxic contents.
